shortcutSuffix.message: or click the add button to save this page

extDescription.message: Bookmark any page in one click. Search, filter & tag your reading list. Never lose an article again. Your personal read-later inbox.

cmdAddToRead.message: Add current page to reading list

demoItem1Title.message: 👋 Welcome to ToRead! Click + in the top-right or use the shortcut to save pages

demoItem1Summary.message: Click ✓ to mark as read, D to delete, J/K to navigate, Enter to open. Try it now!

demoItem2Title.message: 🏷️ Tags: Label articles and click a tag to filter by it

demoItem2Summary.message: Hover a card and click the tag icon to add tags. Click any tag to filter. Works together with search (AND logic).

demoItem3Title.message: 🔍 Search: Type in the search box to filter by title or site

demoItem3Summary.message: Fuzzy match on title and domain. Combine with tag filter for precise results.

demoItem4Title.message: ✅ This is a read example — marked items fade out, use "Clear read" to remove them

demoItem4Summary.message: Click ✓ or press R to mark as read. Read items stay visible but dimmed.
